sources.title: ALBA official homepage
sources.evidence_summary: Official ALBA website landing page with navigation to schools, admissions, fees, financial aid, student life, and official PDFs.

sources.title: Admissions et Inscriptions
sources.evidence_summary: Official admissions page with sections for Licences, Masters, Scolarité et Frais, Demandes d'attestations, Aide financière, and Orientation.

sources.title: Demande Masters 2026-2027 Master PDF
sources.evidence_summary: Official ALBA Master application file for 2026-2027. It states that the candidate has read the conditions required for admission to the Master applied for.

sources.title: École d’architecture
sources.evidence_summary: Official school page for Architecture. It documents the school and architecture curriculum context, but this discovery did not find a clear separate official Master or PhD admission/program claim on this page.

sources.title: Architecture d’intérieur
sources.evidence_summary: Official ALBA section page explicitly listing Master en Architecture d'Intérieur and describing its mission/objectives.

sources.title: École des Arts Décoratifs - Section Design
sources.evidence_summary: Official section page listing Master en Design Global and describing it as a two-year program preparing professionals for a changing world.

sources.title: Master in Global Design at ALBA PDF
sources.evidence_summary: Official ALBA PDF describing the Master in Global Design as a transformative two-year program.

sources.title: Graphisme et Publicité
sources.evidence_summary: Official page explicitly listing Master en Graphisme et Publicité and describing its mission to train creative directors and related communication professions.

sources.title: Illustration
sources.evidence_summary: Official page explicitly describing the Master en Illustration et Bande Dessinée and its mission.

sources.title: Animation 2D/3D
sources.evidence_summary: Official page listing Master en Animation 2D/3D and describing the formation of professionals in animated image/cinema fields.

sources.title: École de Cinéma et de Réalisation Audiovisuelle
sources.evidence_summary: Official page listing Master en Réalisation Cinéma and Master en Production Audiovisuelle; it describes the audiovisual production master as unique in the MENA region and the cinema master as preparation for creative/research/writing/production/post-production work.

sources.title: Institut d’Urbanisme
sources.evidence_summary: Official institute page stating that two trainings of Master and Licence levels are offered: design urbain and paysage; it explicitly lists Master en Design Urbain.

sources.title: École des Arts Visuels
sources.evidence_summary: Official school page for Visual Arts. Discovery did not find clear official Master or PhD program evidence here.

sources.title: École de Mode
sources.evidence_summary: Official school page for Fashion. It lists Licence en Design de Mode; no official Master or PhD evidence was found on this page.

sources.title: Livret de l'étudiant 2025-2026 PDF
sources.evidence_summary: Official student booklet linked from the ALBA site for student guidance and institutional/student-life reference.

sources.title: Brochure Générale 2023 PDF
sources.evidence_summary: Official general brochure linked from the ALBA homepage/student-life area. Useful as supporting catalog-style source, but program pages were preferred as primary evidence for current Master offerings.
